value.body:
## Summary

Upgrade `@swc/core` in `@cycle/desktop` from 1.15.40 to 1.15.41.

## Affected manifest

- `packages/desktop/package.json`

## Rationale

`pnpm outdated --recursive --format json` reports a patch release. This is a small compiler dependency update, but it should still go through the desktop build path.

## Verification

- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop build`.
- Run `pnpm --filter @cycle/desktop typecheck`.
- Run `pnpm check`.
value.title: Upgrade @swc/core to 1.15.41
